display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Can it reach arbitrary external
endpoints? generic HTTP, HTTP+AAD off-tenant,
arbitrary-conn-string SQL, unsanctioned SaaS

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Blocked at tenant scope
allow per-env only w/ case + monitoring

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does the org sanction it for
corporate / official-record data?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Custom connector or only one
risky action in it?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Business, but action-level block
the risky action
